items.briefing:
The recent Canvas hack serves as a timely reminder for Australian training organisations: paying a ransom doesn't guarantee your data is safe or deleted. Criminals often retain or sell stolen information regardless of payment, and there's no way to verify compliance. This is especially concerning for RTOs that hold sensitive student records and personal details.

Separately, scammers are becoming increasingly sophisticated, using impersonation tactics to target individuals — a trend relevant to all staff handling communications. Routine tasks like clicking links or responding to emails remain the most common entry points for attacks.

**Practical tip:** Never assume a ransom payment resolves a data breach — report incidents to the Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC) at cyber.gov.au immediately.
